faqs.question: How much does silverfish control cost in Baychester?
faqs.answer: Silverfish control in Baychester typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size of your property and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: Why are silverfish common in Baychester homes?
faqs.answer: Silverfish thrive in Baychester due to the area's humid conditions, older building stock, and abundance of their preferred hiding spots like basements, bathrooms, and storage areas. They're attracted to moisture, starch, and cellulose found in books, paper, and clothing.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a silverfish infestation in Baychester?
faqs.answer: Most silverfish infestations in Baychester can be significantly reduced within 2-3 weeks of initial treatment. Complete elimination typically requires follow-up visits to address eggs and remaining adults, with full control achieved within 4-6 weeks depending on infestation severity.

faqs.question: Are silverfish treatments safe for Baychester apartments and co-ops?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for use in residential settings, including apartments and co-ops throughout Baychester. Our treatments are pet-friendly and child-safe when applied according to our protocols, and we work with building management to ensure minimal disruption to residents.
